title: SafeX Solutions overview
content: SafeX Solutions presents itself as a technology solutions company focused on helping businesses use digital tools more effectively. Its public website highlights services across cybersecurity, AI chatbot automation, web development, digital marketing, creative media production, and training initiatives.

title: SafeX services
content: SafeX lists a multi-service offering: cyber security solutions, AI chatbot automation, web development, digital marketing, creative media production, and training programs. The strongest public use case for a chatbot is helping visitors quickly understand these service areas and decide which service fits their need.
sample_questions: Which SafeX service is right for my business?

title: Cyber security solutions
content: SafeX includes cyber security solutions among its core services. A visitor can ask about this when they need help protecting business systems, reducing digital risk, or improving security awareness before contacting the company for a detailed consultation.
sample_questions: Can SafeX help protect my business online?

title: AI chatbot automation
content: SafeX includes AI chatbot automation as a service area. This can support customer service, lead capture, FAQs, and repetitive workflow automation. This prototype demonstrates that idea by turning SafeX website content into a small, deployable FAQ assistant.
sample_questions: Can SafeX build an AI chatbot?
How can chatbots help my business?

title: Web development
content: SafeX offers web development services for businesses that need a stronger online presence. The public site positions this service alongside digital marketing, creative media, cybersecurity, AI automation, and training.
sample_questions: Can SafeX improve my business website?

title: Digital marketing
content: SafeX lists digital marketing as one of its service areas. This can help businesses improve online visibility, reach customers, and connect their website or content strategy with broader business goals.
sample_questions: Can SafeX help with online marketing?
How can SafeX improve customer reach?

title: Creative media production
content: SafeX includes creative media production in its public service list. This complements marketing and web work by supporting visual content, campaign assets, and brand communication.

title: Training programs
content: SafeX promotes training programs through its public website, including the SafeX Digital Community page. The chatbot can direct learners to check the official site for current program details, eligibility, schedules, and registration information.
sample_questions: What is the SafeX Digital Community?
How can I learn through SafeX?

title: Contacting SafeX
content: For pricing, project scope, schedules, partnerships, or official registration details, visitors should contact SafeX through the contact options on its official website. This prototype avoids inventing private contact details and points users back to the official SafeX site.
sample_questions: Where can I ask about pricing?
How do I start a project with SafeX?
